title: Grammar and HIR support for attributes and lambdas
body:
Extended the **grammar** and **HIR** to support **attributes** and **lambda expressions** end-to-end through parse and HIR lowering shapes.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `pekan`
- **Commit:** [`47b24da`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/pekan/commit/47b24da)
- **Subject:** Add attribute and lambda expression support to grammar and HIR
- **Completed:** 2026-03-02

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.0 (Pecan prototype)
- **Workstream:** `compiler-analysis`
- **Deliverable:** `v00-analysis-foundation`

## Relation
Modern Beskid surface syntax depends on attributes and lambdas; this commit is the Pecan-era proof that the parser/HIR pipeline could absorb them before the compiler submodule handoff. Last major analysis-foundation language-meta spike before v0.0 cutoff end (`dd75bff`).

source.subject: Add attribute and lambda expression support to grammar and HIR
